ui.babel.title: Babel
This page uses the premade babel:monologue page template. This template only consists of text, which in practice is actually not something you will probably be doing often. It exists in case you need it.
wiki.babel.page.page_template_item.title: babel:item Page Template
wiki.babel.page.page_template_item.body: This page uses the premade babel:item page template. This template displays up to 5 specified items, which can be inline or referenced from either a vanilla item ID or loot table.
wiki.babel.page.page_template_mob.title: babel:mob Page Template
wiki.babel.page.page_template_mob.body: This page uses the premade babel:mob page template. This template contains a set of inputs for a mob's base stats, and a text input which is meant for a custom character which represents a mob.
